features: 【PERFECT QUALITY】Made of premium environmental friendly material,the paper gift bags are sturdy and recyclable.They are thick enough to hold up well and not easy to break,and the robust handle and bottom make it easy to take around.The surface of bags is waterproof and dustproof.

【MULTIPURPOSE】The classic color and moderate size make the bags ideal for various occasions,such as Christmas,Valentines,wedding,bridal shower to hold gifts,clothing,books,comestics,souvenir,etc.Perfect for friends,family,clients,colleague.Practical and stylish.

【ADD VALUE OF YOUR GIFT】With the delicate look and premium quality,Yieseang gift bag will enhance the value of your gift,making it look luxury.Your recipient will be delighted not only by what's inside but also the overall presentation.

【DIY CREATIVITY】The solid color enables you to personalize the bags with your own imagination and design.You can draw,print and decorate them to make them more unique.This will also convey your sincerity.
【BOW RIBBON DESIGN】The golden ribbon bow will not only add a lovely finishing touch, ,but also enrich your gift, making your gift amazing.
description: Product Description Do you want to give the gift recipient an extra surprise？ What if the gift bag itself was no less than a gift on its own? Yieseang gift bags will make your gift stand out,elevating the act of gift-giving and making your giftee feel the love that you put into the present. The packaging is just as important as what's inside,espacially if you want to surprise someone important. Yieseang gift bags can convey what you want to express,bring each other closer. A cute way not only presenting your gift,but also decorating your party. Self-Standing Bottom The reinforced flat bottom gives the bags better load-bearing capacity.They can stand well even on heavy load. Solid Handles Stronger than normal paper handles.Sturdy enough to meet your daily needs.Provide you a more comfortable feeling on heavy load. Waterproof Surface The waterproof and thick surface can protect the inner goods better and not easy to break. Specifications: Color:Blue Size: 12.6x9.8x3.9inches,(32 x 25x 10cm) Weight Load:about 5 lbs Net Weight:about 650g Package Includes:8 x gift bags(blue);8 x bow ribbon(gold),8 x handles(gold) Application Scene:birthday,wedding,baby shower,Christmas,Valentines,graduation parties,Thanksgiving,bachelor parties,boutiques,market stalls,craft projects. Feature Gift Bags Party Favor Bags Shopping Bags Wedding Welcome Bags Retail Carry bags Paper Carry Bags Warm Tips: 1.The bags are flat packed with the ribbons and handles separate,so you will take a few minutes to tie the bow ribbons and handles yourself.Do not worry,it is quite easy. 2.Please confirm the size before buying.
